name: getContrast
description: Determines whether a color is light or dark using W3C perceived brightness formula, useful for choosing contrasting text colors.
usage_guidelines: Use to determine appropriate text color for backgrounds.
Supports hex (#RGB, #RRGGBB) and rgb(r, g, b) formats.
Uses W3C formula for perceived brightness calculation.
Returns 'light' or 'dark' for easy conditional styling.

params.name: color
params.description: Color string in hex (#RGB or #RRGGBB) or rgb(r, g, b) format.

Do: Use for dynamic text color selection
Dont: Don't use for precise WCAG contrast ratios
Don't rely solely on this for accessibility
